2604.08435.title: HST-HGN: Heterogeneous Spatial-Temporal Hypergraph Networks with Bidirectional State Space Models for Global Fatigue Assessment
2604.08435.paper_summary: It remains challenging to assess driver fatigue from untrimmed videos under constrained computational budgets, due to the difficulty of modeling long-range temporal dependencies in subtle facial expressions. Some existing approaches rely on computationally heavy architectures, whereas others employ traditional lightweight pairwise graph networks, despite their limited capacity to model high-order synergies and global temporal context. Therefore, we propose HST-HGN, a novel Heterogeneous Spatial-Temporal Hypergraph Network driven by Bidirectional State Space Models. Spatially, we introduce a hierarchical hypergraph network to fuse pose-disentangled geometric topologies with multi-modal texture patches dynamically. This formulation encapsulates high-order synergistic facial deformations, effectively overcoming the limitations of conventional methods. In temporal terms, a Bi-Mamba module with linear complexity is applied to perform bidirectional sequence modeling. This explicit temporal-evolution filtering enables the network to distinguish highly ambiguous transient actions, such as yawning versus speaking, while encompassing their complete physiological lifecycles. Extensive evaluations across diverse fatigue benchmarks demonstrate that HST-HGN achieves state-of-the-art performance. In particular, our method strikes a balance between discriminative power and computational efficiency, making it well-suited for real-time in-cabin edge deployment.
2604.08435.paper_summary_zh: 評估駕駛疲勞仍然是一項挑戰，因為在受限的計算預算下，從未修剪的視頻中建模微妙的面部表情的長期時間依賴性非常困難。一些現有的方法依賴於計算密集型架構，而其他方法則採用傳統的輕量級成對圖網絡，儘管它們在建模高階協同作用和全球時間上下文方面能力有限。因此，我們提出了HST-HGN，一種由雙向狀態空間模型驅動的全新異質空間-時間超圖網絡。在空間上，我們引入了一個層次化的超圖網絡，以動態融合姿勢解耦的幾何拓撲與多模態紋理補丁。這種表述封裝了高階協同的面部變形，有效克服了傳統方法的局限性。在時間方面，應用了一個線性複雜度的Bi-Mamba模塊來執行雙向序列建模。這種明確的時間演變過濾使得網絡能夠區分高度模糊的瞬態行為，例如打哈欠與說話，同時涵蓋它們的完整生理生命周期。在各種疲勞基準上的廣泛評估顯示，HST-HGN達到了最先進的性能。特別是，我們的方法在區分能力和計算效率之間取得了平衡，使其非常適合實時車內邊緣部署。
2604.08435.author: Changdao Chen et.al.
